vocab.meaning: trò chơi tự do (không theo quy tắc định sẵn)
vocab.example: I spent hours in unstructured play, simply roaming the fields and making up games as I went along.

vocab.meaning: một trí tưởng tượng vô cùng phong phú
vocab.example: Being an only child, I relied on a vivid imagination to turn my bedroom into a medieval fortress.

vocab.meaning: leo trèo một cách khó khăn (thường dùng cho trẻ con leo cây/vách)
vocab.example: My friends and I would often clamber up the old oak tree in the backyard to see who could reach the highest branch.

vocab.meaning: thong thả dành thời gian làm việc gì đó
vocab.example: I remember whiling away the hours by the river, trying to catch minnows with nothing but a plastic cup.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi mang tính chạm/xúc giác (như nặn đất sét, nghịch cát)
vocab.example: I had a real affinity for tactile play, particularly kneading dough in the kitchen with my grandmother.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm hoàn toàn vào cái gì
vocab.example: I used to immerse myself in adventure novels, losing all track of time until my mother called me for dinner.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi nhằm mục đích giải trí
vocab.example: Drawing was my primary recreational pursuit; I would sketch everything from family pets to local landmarks.
Building elaborate models out of recycled materials really helped to foster creativity during my early years.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu/kỳ công ngoài trời
vocab.example: My childhood was defined by our daring outdoor exploits, like building secret dens in the nearby woods.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu với bạn bè cùng trang lứa
vocab.example: The local playground was the perfect spot to socialize with peers and learn the basics of teamwork.
